name: Tortellini with Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a medium-size saucepan.
2. Add the heavy cream and heat through.
3. Cook the tortellini in boiling salted water, then drain them.
4. Place the drained tortellini in a heated serving bowl.
5. Pour the cream-butter mixture over the tortellini and toss thoroughly so that some of the cream is absorbed.
6. Add 1/2 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese and a generous quantity of pepper; toss again.
7. Pass additional cheese at the table.
